Event Name: Free Wellness On The Green Event
Event Description: Wellness on the Lawn! April 25, 9AM–12PM | FREE Fitness classes, cold plunge, sauna, mimosas, IV bar & giveaways. Free + family-friendly Join us at Desert Ridge Marketplace for the Wellness on the Green Wellness Event on the AMC Lawn from 9AM-12PM for a morning of wellness, movement, and relaxation. Experience multiple FREE fitness classes, including classes from Reformed Pilates, PVOLVE( Jennifer Anisten's fitness company), refresh in our cold plunge and sauna, sip mimosas at our mobile Sip & Stroll bar, and boost your energy at the on-site IV station. Plus, enjoy giveaways, wellness-inspired surprises, and more as you recharge. This free, family-friendly event is the perfect way to glow, flow, and feel your best – don’t miss it!

April is Filipino Food Month, and we’re celebrating the best way we know how… with a community food festival! Get ready to celebrate April - Filipino Food Month with music, food, and fun at the Filipinos Food Festival! Hosted by AZ Filipinos. This celebration will be a vibrant mix of tradition, talent, and togetherness. BYO Chair/Banig/Picnic Blanket :) Our mission is to connect Filipino Americans in Arizona through community building, culture, and celebration. AZ Filipinos aims to cultivate a vibrant, intergenerational Filipino community in Phoenix that honors our heritage, empowers our future, and creates inclusive spaces where every Filipino whether born here or newly arrived feels seen, celebrated, and connected.
